text:
Comment on attachment 247098
Modified patch to be applicable on the top of /usr/ports

Thanks! Your new patch applied, built, worked (not actually removed portts, though) fine on stable/14 environment. Now obsoleting my intermediate patch.

As I'm on the way updating my daily use stable/14 environment now, cannot test on main branch, which actually had the issue for a while.

I'll report back as soon as I could take time to switch to main environment.
It's on different drive of absolutely same PC as stable/14 environment.
